task_completion.description: Open the ExamAnxiety.csv dataset in JASP
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JASP window shows the loaded dataset with columns such as Exam, Anxiety, and Revise.
The Linear Regression analysis panel is open in the JASP interface.

task_completion.description: Assign Exam as the dependent variable and Revise and Anxiety as covariates
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Linear Regression panel, 'Exam' is in the Dependent Variable box, and 'Revise' and 'Anxiety' are in the Covariates box.

task_completion.description: Include an interaction term between Revise and Anxiety in the model
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the Model section of the Linear Regression panel, an interaction term (e.g., Revise * Anxiety or Revise:Anxiety) is added to the Model Terms.

task_completion.description: Generate a simple slopes analysis with Revise on the x-axis and Anxiety as the moderator
task_completion.visual_evidence: A simple slopes plot or table is visible in the JASP results pane, showing Revise on the x-axis and Anxiety as the moderating variable.
A save dialog or the JASP window title indicates the file is being saved as 'Moderation_Analysis.jasp' in the /home/ga/Documents/JASP/ directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the JASP graphical user interface to perform the analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with JASP menus, dialogs, and panels rather than terminal commands executing scripts.

integrity.description: The results appear to be genuinely generated by JASP.
integrity.visual_evidence: The results pane displays formatted JASP tables and plots, not plain text or manually constructed outputs.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent using terminal commands like 'cp' or python scripts to create the .jasp file directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The dataset path is /home/ga/Documents/JASP/ExamAnxiety.csv. The required analysis is Linear Regression. The model must include 'Revise', 'Anxiety', and the interaction term 'Revise:Anxiety' (or 'Revise * Anxiety'). A simple slopes analysis must be generated (simpleSlopes parameter set to true). The final output must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/JASP/Moderation_Analysis.jasp.
